name: Ventiv Technology RMIS API
what_it_does: Ventiv Technology enterprise RMIS (Risk Management Information System) REST API for corporate risk management departments, TPAs, and insurers managing claims, insurance programs, safety, and risk analytics. Enables AI agents to manage claim creation and status tracking for risk management claims automation, handle insurance policy and endorsement management for enterprise insurance program automation, access safety incident and OSHA recordable tracking for EHS compliance automation, retrieve certificate of insurance management for vendor risk management automation, manage actuarial loss run generation for insurance renewal automation, handle captive program and alternative risk financing for self-insured program reporting, access risk analytics and total cost of risk reporting for enterprise risk intelligence, retrieve third-party administrator integration for TPA claims data aggregation, manage fleet and property risk tracking for commercial risk portfolio automation, and integrate Ventiv with TPA systems, broker portals, and ERP for full enterprise risk management ecosystem.
use_cases: Aggregating TPA claims from risk manager agents
Tracking insurance programs from renewal agents
Monitoring safety incidents from EHS agents
Generating loss runs from actuarial agents
not_for: Legal matter management and case tracking
best_when: A corporate risk management department, large TPA, or insurance program manager wanting AI agents to automate claims aggregation from multiple TPAs, insurance policy tracking, COI management, safety incident reporting, and total cost of risk analytics within Ventiv as the enterprise RMIS.
avoid_when: VENTIV ACQUISITION AND PRODUCT CONSOLIDATION HISTORY: Ventiv Technology has undergone multiple ownership changes and product consolidations (formerly known as ISG iVOS, Aon eSolutions, and other branded products); verify current Ventiv product branding and API stability before automation investment; legacy Ventiv product APIs may differ from current Ventiv RMIS. ACTUARIAL DATA PROFESSIONAL CERTIFICATION: Automated loss run and actuarial data extraction from Ventiv for insurance renewal, captive program, or financial reporting requires actuarial professional review; automated reserve adequacy reports without FCAS sign-off creates actuarial misrepresentation exposure. MULTI-TPA DATA LATENCY AND INCONSISTENCY: Ventiv aggregates claim data from multiple TPA integrations (Gallagher Bassett, Sedgwick, Broadspire); automated aggregate risk analytics must account for different TPA data feed frequencies and latency; automated total cost of risk reporting using stale TPA feeds creates incomplete program analytics.

auth.notes: Ventiv Technology uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Atlanta, Georgia HQ (Ventiv Technology). Private (Warburg Pincus PE). Ventiv was previously known as ISG (Insurance Services Group) and includes former Aon eSolutions, Riskonnect (separate company), and other acquisitions. Global enterprise RMIS with $300M+ ARR. Major insurance companies, TPAs, and risk management departments. Competes with Origami Risk, Riskonnect, and Majesco for enterprise RMIS.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription with module pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by module (claims, safety, insurance, analytics); enterprise volume pricing; TPA and carrier pricing available
pricing.notes: Atlanta GA. Warburg Pincus PE. $300M+ ARR. Global enterprise RMIS. Annual subscription by module.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; claims and analytics queries throttled; no webhooks — polling required

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — CLAIMS AND RISK DATA EVENTS REQUIRE POLLING: Ventiv does not support native webhooks; automated risk management workflows, TPA data aggregation, and policy tracking require scheduled polling; design polling aligned with daily TPA data feed schedules and weekly risk reporting cycles

VENTIV PRODUCT BRANDING AND LEGACY SYSTEM CONFUSION: Ventiv Technology has multiple legacy product names (iVOS, Aon eSolutions, ISG, other acquisitions); different client instances may run on different legacy platform versions; API endpoints and data models may differ between legacy and current Ventiv RMIS; verify specific client implementation version before API automation

MULTI-TPA FEED TIMING AND COMPLETENESS FOR AGGREGATE ANALYTICS: Ventiv aggregates TPA claim data via periodic feed integration (typically nightly batch); automated total cost of risk or aggregate reserve reporting must account for TPA feed completion time; automated analytics using pre-feed-completion data creates incomplete program view for risk department reporting

Captive program regulatory reporting accuracy — automated captive insurance program reporting using Ventiv data for captive regulatory filings (Cayman, Vermont, Bermuda domicile) must maintain captive-specific data isolation and regulatory reporting format; automated captive reporting without domicile-specific regulatory format creates captive compliance filing error

Insurance program certificate tracking for large contractor programs — automated COI tracking for large self-insured contractor programs (50,000+ subcontractors) in Ventiv requires efficient batch COI processing; automated high-volume COI monitoring with real-time expiry alerting requires API rate limit optimization; implement batched COI verification workflow for large contractor programs

OSHA recordable classification in Ventiv safety module — automated OSHA 300 recordable incident classification in Ventiv must be reviewed by EHS professional before official recordation; automated classification of borderline incidents (first aid vs medical treatment) creates systematic OSHA 300 misclassification; implement EHS professional review gate for automated OSHA recordable determination
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise RMIS. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2/API key. US/EU/AU/UK. Claims, risk, and insurance program data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise RMIS. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. Global. Claims and risk management data.
